text: Dad the student gov meeting ran long bc Amara and I deadlocked on the transit funding proposal AGAIN. gonna be like 11 before I'm back at the apartment 😤
That girl keeps you sharp though. Did you eat?
grabbed something with Marcus after the Writing Center shift so yes lol. also Priya made rice so I'm good
Good. Syracuse winters — you need fuel. How's the proposal looking now?
honestly we might just table the municipal cost-share angle and go direct to the university senate. Amara actually came around a little by the end
Smart pivot. Proud of you. Text when you're in for the night.
Emeka said you had that big student gov vote today?? Did your proposal pass?? You've been stressed about that thing for WEEKS
lmaooo yes. Amara and I finally got the mental health resource center funding approved. took three sessions of back and forth but it passed
That's my child!! So proud. Are you actually eating or just surviving on Writing Center vending machines again 😭
writing center doesn't have vending machines mom. just vibes and a broken Keurig
Brian. I will Venmo you right now. Go get real food after your shift, I mean it. Syracuse has restaurants
...fine. also Marcus is coming up this weekend so I'll eat then too if that counts for anything
bro Priya just signed up for a writing center appt without telling me 💀 found her name in the queue for tomorrow. do i just… tutor my own roommate or pretend i didn't see it
LMAOOO you're cooked. just swap shifts with someone
can't, Amara has student gov and my other shift is blocked by that 8am class block. i'm stuck
just be professional about it. she's paying tuition for a reason lol
she's gonna show me her ESSAY emeka. i live with this woman. i know her writing
bro just help her get a B+ and go home 😭 this is not that deep
Dad the student gov meeting ran long bc Amara and I deadlocked on the transit funding proposal AGAIN. gonna be like 11 before I'm back at the apartment 😤
That girl keeps you sharp though. Did you eat?
